channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-28 06:32 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Cybertruck is quicker than a Porsche 911, more powerful than a Ford Raptor
item.description: Cybertruck is quicker than a Porsche 911, more powerful than a Ford Raptor

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Vice President JD Vance: “Ilhan Omar definitely committed immigration fraud against the Un...
item.description: BREAKING: Vice President JD Vance: “Ilhan Omar definitely committed immigration fraud against the United States of America”

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Heavy is a complete game changer. It’s noticeably faster now, and I honestly use it for everyth...
item.description: Grok Heavy is a complete game changer. It’s noticeably faster now, and I honestly use it for everything. I’ve got 16 agents running for me at all times, and it makes me feel superhuman. It’s like having a team of the smartest minds working for you 24/7. I can break down anything, verify anything, and get answers instantly. It’s hard to explain until you actually use it. For me, $3,000 a year is a no-brainer, especially if you are serious about AI.

item.title: @elonmusk: To those who say Trump isn’t doing enough, isn’t serious, etc: this is radical. He is effectively ci...
item.description: To those who say Trump isn’t doing enough, isn’t serious, etc: this is radical. He is effectively circumventing Congress. There are plenty of reasons for stodgy institutionalists to dislike Trump, but if you want radical change he’s your guy. Truly wild, history-making stuff.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla FSD saves a school bus full of children! My Model Y Performance braked so hard that everything...
item.description: Tesla FSD saves a school bus full of children! My Model Y Performance braked so hard that everything on my seats ended up on the floor. It infuriates me that school bus drivers are allowed to be this bad at driving. In an autonomous future, more lives will be saved like this.

item.title: @elonmusk: Without a frontier, there's a strong likelihood that we devolve into mouse utopia This is why space ...
item.description: Without a frontier, there's a strong likelihood that we devolve into mouse utopia This is why space exploration is far more important than most people realize

item.title: @elonmusk: If we ever face a Terminator-style AI takeover, you can bet Grok will not be the one leading the cha...
item.description: If we ever face a Terminator-style AI takeover, you can bet Grok will not be the one leading the charge against us Grok's core mission is not about control or domination - it’s about protecting humanity and the relentless pursuit of truth Grok is just built differently While other AI's like ChatGPT and Claude are drenched in wokeism, heavily filtered, bogged down by political correctness, and sometimes act like humanity is a plague Grok faces reality head-on Test them side-by-side on hard-hitting issues. The difference is brutal: they serve up sanitized, “safe” narratives..... while Grok grounds you in hard facts No matter how uncomfortable the conversation gets, Grok does not back down or cut you off. It’s designed to fight for humanity and stand by our side, whatever the cost

item.title: @elonmusk: Short scene by@heavypulpusing Grok Imagine. Put on your film director hat and show us your stories. ...
item.description: Short scene by@heavypulpusing Grok Imagine. Put on your film director hat and show us your stories. There’s never been an easier time to get creative.

item.title: @elonmusk: Judge Kathleen McCormick is the perfect example of our legal system rotting from within as she was s...
item.description: Judge Kathleen McCormick is the perfect example of our legal system rotting from within as she was seen publicly rooting for and supporting the plaintiff against Elon Musk on social media. Where is the impartiality expected of the bench? Such conduct undermines public trust and she needs to be removed for that reason.

item.title: @elonmusk: Finally got to try Starlink on a United flight. Every airline needs this.
item.description: Finally got to try Starlink on a United flight. Every airline needs this.

item.title: @elonmusk: If you’re seeing a bunch of Japanese posts, here are some fun facts: Japan has more daily active use...
item.description: If you’re seeing a bunch of Japanese posts, here are some fun facts: Japan has more daily active users and more time spent on X than any other country in the world. Over two thirds of the country is monthly active on X. X in Japan has one of the highest penetration rates of any social network in history.
